post.subject: Jury Service Sucks!!
post.body:
Having to sit from 9:30 to 2:30 while court people get into the freakin' court and lawyers be picky bastards in picking the jurors for the case is a fucking cunt! I was hungry! My ass was sore from sitting in that damn seat all day and i was v tired! Fuck i hate this! At least i dont have it again until Mon and shouldnt have to worry about it after next friday! I never want to do this again!

Why the fuck should i have to put my life on hold for these cunts!
